product_highlights: Carbopol® carbomers — global industry standard for rheology modification
Styleze™ film formers — long-wear styling and color cosmetic applications
Noveon® polycarbophil — multifunctional polymer for topical formulations
Precisely tunable texture profiles from lightweight serums to rich creams
World's leading supplier of Carbopol® with decades of formulation expertise
notes: Lubrizol's personal care division is the world's leading supplier of Carbopol® carbomer polymers, the industry standard for rheology modification in skincare, hair care, and pharmaceutical topical formulations. Their Styleze™ film former range is widely used in styling products and long-wear cosmetics. Lubrizol's sensory polymer portfolio enables formulators to create products with precisely tuned texture profiles, from lightweight serums to rich creams. Their EFfCI GMP certification ensures consistent quality and safety across their entire polymer portfolio.
